upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ihEvEDimApacyozWAH' (f॰10.173.2) mA no hAsIrityAha asmAn hitvA mAnyatra yAsIrityaBipretaM mantrakftaH
'girA vajro na saMBftaH sabalo anapacyutaH' (tE0 brA0 1583) anapacyuto'palAyitaH
'tA anuzWyoccyAvayatAt' (E0 brA0 26) udDaratetyAha anuzWiryatna iti zaqguru0
